name: Yukiguni Maitake Co., Ltd.
summary: Yukiguni Maitake Co. Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells mushrooms and processed food in Japan. Its products include Maitake, Eringi, and Shimeji mushrooms; cut vegetables; maitake and eringi rice mix; aojiru, a green juice health drink; and health foods. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Minamiuonuma, Japan.
